zh.lifeSummary: Ephraim Herrick Sr是Henry Herrick和Editha Laskin的兒子，於大約1637年2月出生在美國麻薩諸塞州艾可薩萊姆。他於1661年7月3日與Mary Crosse在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可貝弗利結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1693年9月18日在美國麻薩諸塞州艾可貝弗利享年56歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州艾可貝弗利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Ephraim Herrick Sr是Henry Herrick和Editha Laskin的儿子，于大约1637年2月出生在美国马萨诸塞州艾可薩萊姆。他于1661年7月3日与Mary Crosse在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可貝弗利结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1693年9月18日在美国马萨诸塞州艾可貝弗利享年56岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州艾可貝弗利。

nameMeanings.name: Herrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Old Norse personal name Eiríkr, Old Danish, Old Swedish Erik, itself from Proto-Scandinavian ain- ‘one, select’ + rík- ‘rule(r)’ + prosthetic H-.

Irish (Cork): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEirc ‘descendant of Erc’, a personal name meaning ‘speckled, dark red’ or ‘salmon’, and borne by a Christian saint. In Munster and Ulster this name has been changed to Harkin .

History: The English poet Robert Herrick (1591–1674) was the son of a wealthy London goldsmith, whose family had a long history in the town of Leicester. DNA analysis suggests that the modern surname is monogenetic, i.e. from a single eponymous bearer. The earliest known bearer of the name in Leicester was John Eirich, recorded as a burgess there in 1211. Leicester was one of the headquarters of the Viking army that conquered and settled the eastern midlands in the late 9th century, leading to the English adoption of many Old Norse personal names, such as Eirikr, as personal names. The initial aspirate is first recorded in the name of Nicholas Heyryke, recorded as a Leicester burgess in 1524.

variants.name: Harkin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Cormac, Jarlath, Paddy.

Irish (Donegal) and Scottish (Lanarkshire and Midlothian): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEarcáin ‘descendant of Earcán’, a byname or personal name formed from a diminutive of earc ‘red, bloody’; also meaning ‘piglet’.

English: from the Middle English personal name Hardekin, Harkin, a borrowing into late Old English of Middle Dutch Hardekin. It is a pet form of ancient Germanic Hardo (see Hard 4) + the Middle Dutch hypocoristic suffix -kin. The name of a (presumably continental) moneyer at Stamford is stamped HÆRƉCYN, HARƉCIN, and HARCIN on coins of the reign of Edward the Confessor.

nameMeanings.name: Ephraim
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, pronounced ‘ee-frame’ borne by one of the sons of Joseph and hence one of the tribes of Israel. The name probably means ‘fruitful’ in Hebrew; it is so explained in the Bible (Genesis 41:52 ‘and the name of the second called he Ephraim: For God hath caused me to be fruitful in the land of my affliction’). This was used by the Puritans in the 16th century, but was used more widely in the 18th and 19th centuries. It is still a common Jewish given name.

en.lifeSummary: Ephraim Herrick Sr was born about February 1637, in Salem, Essex, Massachusetts, United States as the son of Henry Herrick and Editha Laskin. He married Mary Crosse on 3 July 1661, in Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 18 September 1693, in Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts, United States, at the age of 56, and was buried in Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Ephraim Herrick Sr est né environ février 1637, à Salem, Essex, Massachusetts, États-Unis, fils de Henry Herrick et Editha Laskin. Il a épousé Mary Crosse le 3 juillet 1661, à Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 18 septembre 1693, à Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts, États-Unis, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Ephraim Herrick Sr wurde um Februar 1637 in Salem, Essex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten, als Sohn von Henry Herrick und Editha Laskin geboren. Er hat am 3. Juli 1661 in Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Mary Crosse geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 18. September 1693 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Ephraim Herrick Sr è nato il circa febbraio 1637 nel Salem, Essex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America come figlio di Henry Herrick e Editha Laskin. Lui sposato Mary Crosse il 3 luglio 1661, nel Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 18 settembre 1693, nel Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Ephraim Herrick Srは約1637年2月にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州エセックスサレムでHenry HerrickとEditha Laskinの息子として生まれた。1661年7月3日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスベバーリーでMary Crosseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1693年9月18日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州エセックスベバーリーで56歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州エセックスベバーリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ephraim Herrick Sr(은)는 대략 1637년 2월 미국 매사추세츠 주 에세스 살렘에서 Henry Herrick(와)과 Editha Laskin의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1661년 7월 3일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 비버리에서 Mary Crosse(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1693년 9월 18일 미국 매사추세츠 주 에세스 비버리에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 에세스 비버리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Ephraim Herrick Sr nasceu aproximadamente fevereiro de 1637, em Salem, Essex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América filho de Henry Herrick e Editha Laskin. Ele casou-se com Mary Crosse em 3 de julho de 1661, em Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de setembro de 1693, em Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Ephraim Herrick Sr родился около февраль 1637 г. в местности сеилем, эссекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. Его родителей звали Henry Herrick и Editha Laskin. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Crosse 3 июля 1661 г. в местности бивирли, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 18 сентября 1693 г. в местности бивирли, эссекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности бивирли, эссекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Ephraim Herrick Sr nació aproximadamente febrero de 1637, en Salem, Essex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos como hijo de Henry Herrick y Editha Laskin. Se casó con Mary Crosse el 3 de julio de 1661, en Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 18 de septiembre de 1693, en Beverly, Essex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Beverly, Essex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
